canonicalChoiceReason: User-designated keep slug. Has 4 source references with real URLs (vs 2 for archive). Cleaner, shorter slug. Both are published.

fieldDecisions.note: Shortened to 'Evacuation Go-Bag' for clarity in a crisis. Both titles are adequate but the canonical is more concise.
Canonical is 'scenario', archive is 'preparedness'. Using canonical's layer per identity-fields rule. The merged guide absorbs preparedness content into a scenario-layer guide.
Canonical is 'scenario_guide', archive is 'preparedness_guide'. Using canonical per identity-fields rule.
Archive summary is more specific, listing the categories of items to pack. Lightly edited for clarity.
Archive version is more actionable and specific than canonical's identical-to-summary text.
Combined canonical's emphasis on speed with archive's mention of official guidance.
Canonical had no backupAction. Archive provides a practical fallback for minimal packing.

fieldDecisions.source: 6 steps from archive + 2 unique elements from canonical (child/pet/disability items, protective footwear), deduplicated to 8 steps
fieldDecisions.note: Archive had more granular steps. Canonical added child/pet/disability item mention and protective footwear. Merged and ordered logically.

fieldDecisions.source: Union of both guides, deduplicated to 3 unique warnings
fieldDecisions.note: Canonical had weight and delay warnings. Archive had weight and medication rotation warnings. Weight warning deduplicated.
Canonical had no whatNotToDo entries. Archive had 2 good entries.

fieldDecisions.source: Union of both guides, deduplicated to 3 unique red flags
fieldDecisions.note: Both had relevant but distinct red flags. All kept.
Canonical had no preparednessTips. Archive had 3 useful tips.
Combined canonical's disaster-type list with archive's short-notice framing.

fieldDecisions.source: 4 from canonical + 1 unique from archive (BC Gov), deduplicated by organization+topic to 5 total
fieldDecisions.note: Both had Ready.gov 'Build A Kit' — kept canonical's version. Archive added BC Government source.

fieldDecisions.source: Union of both guides' tags, deduplicated to 6

conflicts.resolution: Using canonical's 'scenario' layer per consolidator identity-fields rule. The merged guide incorporates preparedness content within the scenario framing.
Using canonical's 'scenario_guide' type per identity-fields rule.

conflicts.valueA: 4 high-level steps combining multiple items per step
conflicts.valueB: 6 more granular steps with specific categories per step
conflicts.resolution: Merged using archive's more granular structure as base, incorporating canonical's unique items (child/pet/disability gear, protective footwear). No safety-critical factual conflict.

archiveCandidateWarnings: expedition-preparation-checklist has alternativeToGuideSlugs pointing to personal-evacuation-go-bag-adult — this reference must be updated to evacuation-go-bag after the archive slug is retired.
